body: import java.io.BufferedInputStream;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStream;
import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream;
import java.io.DataInputStream;
import java.io.FileDescriptor;
import java.io.PipedInputStream;
import java.io.PipedOutputStream;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunnerParameters;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
import org.evosuite.runtime.EvoRunner;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.apache.commons.fileupload.ProgressListener;
import org.apache.commons.fileupload.MultipartStream;
import org.evosuite.runtime.ViolatedAssumptionAnswer;
import org.evosuite.runtime.mock.java.io.MockFileInputStream;
import static org.evosuite.runtime.EvoAssertions.*;
import static org.evosuite.shaded.org.mockito.Mockito.*;

translation: # The length of a boundary token cannot be changed
assert str(e) == "The length of a boundary token cannot be changed"
# The buffer size specified for the MultipartStream is too small
self.assertTrue("Array index out of range" in str(e))
self.assertEqual(str(e), "The buffer size specified for the MultipartStream is too small")
assert str(e) == "No more data is available"
assert str(e) == "The length of a boundary token cannot be changed"
